title: SapphireMod
body:
---

SapphireMod

---

CURRENT VERSION: Y21U1B3A 


SapphireMod is a mod that adds Sapphire ore and Sapphire tools to the game! It is run on the Fabric Mod loader and currently supports minecraft 1.16.5!

Here is the "Issue Tracker" and Todo List: https://trello.com/b/dyA3Mq0m/sapphiremod

Spoiler: Next beta quite big beta
